description: You are preparing a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for an upcoming ISO 9001 audit. Open the draft at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/draft_QA_SOP_08.docx in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor and format it into a compliant SOP. Apply the 'Heading 1' style to the title 'SOP-08: Control of Nonconforming Outputs' and 'Heading 2' style to the four main section headers ('1. Purpose', '2. Scope', '3. Procedure', and '4. Revision History'). Change the font of all standard body paragraphs to Arial, size 11. Format the paragraph starting with 'WARNING: Do not release...' to be Bold and Red. Under '4. Revision History', convert the comma-separated text into a 4-column table. Add a document header with the text 'ISO 9001:2015 QMS Document' and save the final document as ~/Documents/TextDocuments/QA_SOP_08_Final.docx.
